traits.name: Spectral Dagger (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest) (bonus)
traits.text: The drow conjures a floating, spectral dagger within 60 feet of itself. The drow can make a melee spell attack (10 to hit) against one creature within 5 feet of the dagger. On a hit, the target takes 9 (1d8 + 5) force damage. The dagger lasts for 1 minute. As a bonus action on later turns, the drow can move the dagger up to 20 feet and repeat the attack against one creature within 5 feet of the dagger.

traits.name: Discern Lie
traits.text: The drow discerns when a creature in earshot speaks a lie in a language the drow knows.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.text: The drow has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put the drow to sleep.
